## Properties

| Property    | Attribute    | Description                                                             | Type                                              | Default     |
| ----------- | ------------ | ----------------------------------------------------------------------- | ------------------------------------------------- | ----------- |
| `label`     | `label`      | Accessible label                                                        | `string`                                          | `''`        |
| `max`       | `max`        | Maximum value (default 100)                                             | `number`                                          | `100`       |
| `showValue` | `show-value` | Show the numeric percentage next to the bar                             | `boolean`                                         | `false`     |
| `value`     | `value`      | Current value. When undefined the bar shows an indeterminate animation. | `number`                                          | `undefined` |
